job_summary: A Vaccine CRA monitors clinical trials for vaccine development, ensuring safety, efficacy, and regulatory compliance.
key_responsibilities: Ensure cold chain management and vaccine storage compliance
qualifications: Degree in Life Sciences / Pharmacy / Biotechnology
work_environment: Pharma companies, vaccine research institutes, global health organizations
career_path: Vaccine CRA → Senior CRA → Vaccine Program Lead
skills_required: ensure cold chain management and vaccine storage compliance
